name: worker
description: Docker container worker for executing agentic tasks

scripts.invoke: node -e "const net = require('net'); const client = net.createConnection('/tmp/worker.sock', () => { client.write(process.argv[1] + '\n'); }); const rl = require('readline').createInterface({ input: client }); rl.on('line', (line) => { console.log(line); process.exit(0); }); client.on('error', (e) => { console.error('Connection Error:', e.message); process.exit(1); });"
